balance_validation.summary_line: 21 transactions were excluded from analysis due to balance inconsistencies identified during extraction.

edge_policy.description: Clusters are built from an evidence-protected reconstruction graph. Raw graph edges remain available for audit, but weak public-infrastructure or boundary edges do not merge accounts into one case cluster.
rules: Always keep edges that support a fired detector finding.
Keep low-degree non-account endpoints so mule UPI/cash-out destinations are not dropped.
Do not let high-degree public endpoints merge case clusters unless a fired detector already uses that edge.

cluster_summaries.summary: cluster_001 contains 1 connected account(s) and 6 transaction edge(s). The cluster evidence includes no scored pattern.
cluster_002 contains 1 connected account(s) and 7 transaction edge(s). The cluster evidence includes duplicate_verification, round_value_debit_patterns.

Account acct_003 was evaluated as an isolated account with no established transactional link to other accounts in this case. It was associated with duplicate_verification, money_trail_tracing, round_value_debit_patterns, structuring_smurfing_detection.

case_summary: The case contains 3 account cluster(s), with 1 account(s) ranked for suspicious activity. The highest-priority cluster is cluster_003 with total score 1003.24.
